zh.lifeSummary: 當María González Girón於1205年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多時，她的父親Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos45歲，母親Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño39歲。她和Guillén Pérez de Guzmán至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1255年享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当María González Girón于1205年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多时，她的父亲Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos45岁，母亲Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño39岁。她和Guillén Pérez de Guzmán至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1255年享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: González
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jesus, Jorge, Pedro, Francisco, Miguel, Ramon, Raul, Mario.
Spanish (González): patronymic from the personal name Gonzalo . Compare De Gonzalez , Gonsales , Gunsalus , and Portuguese Goncalves .

variants.name: Gonzelez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonsalez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Ruben, Ignacio, Manuel, Alfredo, Elena, Felipe, Guadalupe, Gustavo, Jesus, Jorge.
Hispanic (Gonsález): altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gongalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzolas
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonsales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Ruben, Arcadio, Artemio, Erasmo, Ernesto, Eusebio, Juan, Lupe, Manuel, Miguel.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzalo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Miguel, Pedro, Albino, Amador, Angelina, Arana, Arnaldo, Blanco, Carlos, Casimiro, Castro, Diego.
Spanish: from the personal name Gonzalo, of Visigothic origin, formed with the element gunth ‘battle’.

variants.name: De Gonzalez
meanings: Spanish (De González): patronymic from González (see Gonzalez ), with the preposition de ‘of’.

variants.name: Gozalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Ramon, Ruben, Pedro, Raul, Guadalupe, Lupe.
Spanish: altered form of González (see Gonzalez ).

nameMeanings.name: Girón
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Juan, Luis, Julio, Francisco, Jesus, Manuel, Ana, Jorge, Miguel, Mario.
French: variant of Géron (see Geron ).
French: from a pet form of the personal name Gire, a variant of Gilles .

variants.name: Jiron
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Armando, Carlota, Claudio, Guillermo, Orlando, Rafael, Sergio, Ada Luz, Ana Silvia, Angelina, Candido.
Hispanic (mainly Nicaragua; Jirón): altered form of Spanish Girón (see Giron ).

variants.name: Geron
meanings: French (Géron): from the personal name Gero, Gerone, a short form of ancient Germanic names formed with the element gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, as for example Gérard (see Gerard ).
Altered form of French Guérin (see Guerin ).
English (Lancashire): of Norman origin, from the personal name Geron of ancient Germanic origin, a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: María
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Maria
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When María González Girón was born in 1205, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, her father, Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos, was 45 and her mother, Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño, was 39. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Guillén Pérez de Guzmán. She died in 1255, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque María González Girón est née en 1205, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, son père, Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño, avait 39 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Guillén Pérez de Guzmán. Elle est décédée en 1255, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als María González Girón 1205 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos 45 und ihre Mutter Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño 39. Sie hatte mit Guillén Pérez de Guzmán mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1255 im Alter von 50 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando María González Girón è nata il nel 1205 nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, sua padre, Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño, aveva 39 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Guillén Pérez de Guzmán. Morì nel 1255, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.Castilla-La Mancha, Spain: スペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャ
ja.lifeSummary: María González Girónが1205年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドで生まれた時，父Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballosは45歳，母Sancha Rodriguez de Toroñoは39歳であった。彼女はGuillén Pérez de Guzmánとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1255年に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: María González Girón(이)가 1205년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 Guillén Pérez de Guzmán(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1255년 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando María González Girón nasceu em 1205, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha, seu pai, Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño, tinha 39 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Guillén Pérez de Guzmán. Ela faleceu em 1255, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда María González Girón родилась в 1205 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания, её отцу по имени Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño, 39. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Guillén Pérez de Guzmán. Она умерла в 1255 г. в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando María González Girón nació en 1205, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España, su papá, Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño, tenía 39 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Guillén Pérez de Guzmán. Murió en 1255, a la edad de 50 años.
